programmes.show_description: Dr Magnus Lynch tackles twin lipomas nicknamed Barry and Barbara, and a Welsh carpet fitter needs Dr Dev Shah to help him with 'devil horns'; large cysts on either side of his head.
Drug smugglers, boozed-up brawls on the sea front and beach raves that get out of hand, plus thieving seagulls and ice cream wars - all Caught on Camera.
Observational reality series filmed at the Balham Park Surgery, a busy NHS practice in south-west London. Dr Shilts Shah sheds some light on a woman with self-image issues.
The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless, and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs.
Dr Adil Sheraz is called a magic man after making a giant ear keloid disappear. A breakdancer wants Dr Natalia Spierings to remove head cysts that get in the way of his head spins.
Phoebe is horrified when she is propositioned by Rachel's Italian boyfriend. Meanwhile, Monica struggles with a surfeit of pasta.

Singer Paige prepares for one of her most important gigs yet, hoping to impress with her recently launched tribute to pop diva Lady Gaga.
Mum-of-two Kayleigh teams up with two friends to start their own girl group - and in just a few days they have their biggest gig so far, performing at a wedding.
A dog's loyalty to dad causes chaos at home, three troublesome pooches turn walks into a nightmare, and one dog's violent reaction to noise puts her life at risk. Can Graeme Hall help?
Teaming up with neighbouring forces under Operation Fuego Derbyshire's police chase a getaway driver on a 120mph rampage.
Ant and Mark's dogged pursuit of a stolen moped takes them off their patch into the estates of Sheffield. Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. Jim calls for back up when an angry, uninsured driver is egged on by a hostile mob.
Interceptor Jim heads up a raid for a suspected drug dealer, and Dan and 'Gordy' respond to reports of an alleyway attack.
Tim and Tom team up with Merseyside police to raid a house, and taser-packing interceptors respond to an alleged assault with a meat cleaver.
Dog handler Bob hunts down a suspected knifeman, John wrestles with a drunken reveller, and a tattoo provides a clue to a major drugs bust.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty.
John's DIY goes awry. David cops it from all sides. Cash hands over what he's been hiding.
Remi threatens to be reckless. Justin and Leah adjust to their houseguest. Cash and David work as a team.
Dr Beecraft has to assess whether or not a bipolar patient is safe to take a long-haul flight.
The pace at Barnsley Casualty is relentless; other hospitals in the area are full and as a result, ambulances are being diverted to Barnsley.
Rich, 17, goes flying after hitting a roadblock on his mountain bike. Can surgeons do enough to ensure he doesn't sustain lasting brain injury due to his open skull fracture? (Ep3)
Motorcyclist Danny is rushed into the emergency department following a high-speed road traffic accident in north Wales.
Dr Natalia Spierings gets a face full of cyst contents; Dr Emma McMullen helps a young mum with a satsuma-sized lipoma and  Dr Magnus Lynch burns off some facial warts.
A man found on his kitchen floor in a pool of blood says he is the victim of a hit-and-run car incident. But was he? A motorist is pursued after fleeing the scene of a road collision.
Dr Chris Pearce meets an anxious vicar who is concerned that a bloodshot eye will prevent him leading a funeral the next day. Reality series filmed at the Balham Park Surgery.
The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs.
Two grooms-to-be come to the clinic with lumps they want to get rid of before their big days: Carl has multiple lipomas, while Alan needs a neck cyst removed.
Chandler accidentally sees Rachel in the nude and is shocked when she insists that he return the favour. Phoebe's boyfriend antagonises the group.

Dog rescuers Paul and Mick organise a dog walk where potential adopters can spend time with some of their rescued residents before offering them a home.
Marbella belle Lynda prepares to throw a charity lunch for 50 glamorous grannies and grandpas, with a menu of Spanish tapas and a quiz to encourage attendees to mingle.
Graeme Hall tackles a terrier obsessed with its owner's glasses, a German Shepherd who grabs hold of his tail at any given opportunity, and eight Chihuahuas that need toilet training.
John's 100mph blue-light run panics an unrelated driver into a crash. Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
Derbyshire's Traffic Cops put themselves in the line of danger when they come face to face with aggressive criminals. Traffic Cop Alex  follows 3 men who are believed to be carrying a handgun.
Alex pulls over a young drunk driver trying to impress his mates. A self-declared successful businesswoman is over twice the legal limit.
Observational documentary series. Jenno joins a TPAC-takedown of a man suspected to be armed, and Steve rushes to help a pregnant lady caught up in a three-car smash.
Observational documentary series. Jim and the team spring a trap on suspected drug dealers, while Dan and Gordy track down a man seen roaming the streets armed with two knives.
Observational documentary series. Jenno and Bucko race to assist when Jim is rammed by a runaway driver, and a have-a-go hero helps to tackle a runaway drug driver.

Leah comforts Lacey. Mali and Abigail don't see eye to eye. Sonny gets a glimmer of hope.
Dr Morris treats a number of patients who are wracked with worry and anxiety, including gym-bunny Cherie who is terrified that she will have a heart attack.
It's another busy day for the casualty team with patient numbers unusually high. Sister Rachel is running the shift, and she's under pressure with a shortage of cubicles.
High-octane blockbuster in which a federal aeroplane is hijacked by the convicts it is transporting to a maximum security facility. Starring Nicolas Cage and John Malkovich. (1997)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
